title: Zombie Apocalypse: Optimized
description: Lightweight modpack featuring a zombie survival in Minecraft!
body:
# Introduction
This is a modpack i made with my friend, there's no quests just pure survival about the world with a zombie apocalypse ongoing. We offer hordes, infections and destruction. Even realistic tweaks and a lot of optimization mods to make the modpack as lightweight as possible, while adding more stuff.

# Additional info
The modpack also features:
- 🔫 Guns!
- 🪤 Traps!
- 🧟 Realistic Zombies!
- ☢️ Smart Zombies!
- 🌙 Blood moons!
- 🔥 Fire spread overhaul!
- 🧭 More biomes!
- 🏢 More Structures!
- 👤 Multiplayer Support!
- 🎤 Voice chat for Multiplier!
- 🪵 Lots of building blocks!
- ⛏️ Huge Mining Dimension!
> - To create the portal, craft at least 10 framed polished blackstone blocks, place them in a Nether portal shape and light it with a lava bucket.
- 🩸 Light Gore...
- ✨ All Vanilla structures overhauled!
- 🧑‍🌾 Farmer's Delight!
- And much more...

## Misc

Any bugs report on the comment section under this post -> [here](https://youtube.com/post/UgkxnzdSHMFvSFWU1V3NUnVQa0zrriiKaTcP?si=6RO6XdqcPXtKs7rO)
